REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-09-2025 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** KENNETH TSANG, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. WESLEY ROEBUCK, SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT APPEARING VIA ZOOM. THE COURT WAS NOT GOING TO CONTINUE THIS CASE AND WANTED PARTIES TO RESOLVE THE MATTER TODAY. PLAINTIFF THEREAFTER REQUESTED TO DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT GRANTED THE REQUEST AND DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUIDCE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
